transcript_preview: 1. 2. Klausies un atkārto. Labrīt! Mani sauc Jānis Vaivats. Es esmu pasniedzējis. Labdien! Kā jūs sauc? Mani sauc Natālija. Esmu studente. Labvakar! Vai tu esi Gunta? Jā. Un tu esi Aigars? Tu esi Andris? Nē, es neesmu Andris, es esmu Edgars
translation_preview: 2. Listen and repeat. Good morning! My name is John Wyvat. I'm a teacher. Hello! What's your name? I'm Natalie. I'm a student. Good evening! Are you Gunta? Yeah. And you're Aigars? Are you Andris? No, I'm not Andris, I'm Edgars.
